case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR OFFICE VS. IRAN VICTA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR OFFICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,543.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT VICTA, IRAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS. DEFENDANT IRAN VICTA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE CASE HAS SETTLED AND REQUESTED A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
